findings.title: 1 JavaScript console error(s) detected
findings.description: The browser console reported 1 error(s). First error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 526 ()
findings.fix_prompt: Open your browser DevTools console and fix all JavaScript errors. There are 1 errors to resolve.

summary: Basic technical audit completed (AI analysis was unavailable). Found 1 issue(s) from automated checks.
bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://magento.softwaretestingboard.com and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [HIGH] 1 JavaScript console error(s) detected
   Fix: Open your browser DevTools console and fix all JavaScript errors. There are 1 errors to resolve.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

Journey context:
